title: helianthemum apenninum subsp. pulverulentum
intro: Helianthemum apenninum subsp. pulverulentum, also known as Italian rock rose or silver-leaved rock rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum apenninum subsp. pulverulentum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
